items.title_zh: Meet mKernel: A Multi-GPU, Multi-Node Fused Kernel Library for GPU-Driven Communication
items.summary_zh:
UC Berkeley's UCCL team releases mKernel, fusing intra-node NVLink, inter-node RDMA, and dense compute into a single persistent CUDA kernel.
The post Meet mKernel: A Multi-GPU, Multi-Node Fused Kernel Library for GPU-Driven Communication appeared...
